name: Weather Lookup
description: Get weather forecasts, temperature, rain chance, and umbrella advice for cities and dates.

name: Travel Booking
description: Search flights, trains, hotels, and trip options for specific destinations and dates.

name: Calculator
description: Perform arithmetic, percentages, unit conversion, and other numeric calculations.

name: Document Assistant
description: Summarize, rewrite, extract points, and edit text documents or notes.

name: Market Data
description: Check stock and crypto prices, market performance, and financial closing values.

name: Calendar Scheduler
description: Create, move, or manage alarms, meetings, and calendar events.
